---
title: "Spatial data"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}
library(readr)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(ggspatial)
library(dplyr)
```

# Load data from KNB
```{r}
knb_url <- "https://dev.nceas.ucsb.edu/knb/d1/mn/v2/object/urn%3Auuid%3Aaceaecb2-1ce0-4d41-a839-d3607d32bb58"
#read in a url as a value

# download the zip file
download.file(url = knb_url, destfile = 'shapefile_demo_data.zip')
#chose the zip file from that url

# unzip
unzip('shapefile_demo_data.zip', exdir = 'data')
#unzip the file you downloaded, exdir is where

# remove the zip file
file.remove('shapefile_demo_data.zip')
```

## Exploring the data using plot() and st_crs()
```{r}
ak_region <- read_sf('../training_kjaer/data/ak_regions_simp.shp')
```
